summary: Comprehensive testing of refactored frontend structure with new pages (Dashboard, Summary, Roles, RoleDrillDown) and new API endpoints (/api/summary, /api/job-roles, /api/role/{jobRole}). All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All 16 frontend tests passed (100%). All features working correctly.

backend: API health check - returns healthy status v4.0
Login with admin/admin credentials - returns 200 with cookie
All endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Summary row structure has all required funnel columns
GET /api/summary with date filter returns filtered results
GET /api/job-roles returns job roles with counts
Job roles structure has job_role and count fields
Total count across all roles equals 7
Role analytics has all funnel columns
Role analytics with date filter works
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Login with admin/admin redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard shows Upload Naukri and Upload Pipeline buttons
Dashboard shows View Applicants Summary Statistics nav panel
Dashboard shows View Applicants nav panel
Navigation: Dashboard → Summary page via nav button
Summary page: Table shows 8 columns (Job Role, Total Applicants, Shortlisted, Rejected, Scheduled, Not Scheduled, Attended, Not Attended)
Summary page: TOTAL row shows correct sums (7, 6, 2, 5, 2, 3, 4)
Summary page: Date filter works (2026-01-17 to 2026-01-20 shows 4 roles)
Summary page: Search filter works ('Engineer' shows 3 roles)
Summary page: Reset button clears filters
Summary page: Back button navigates to /dashboard
Navigation: Dashboard → Roles page via nav button
Roles page: Shows grid of 7 clickable job role boxes with counts
Roles page: Click role box → navigates to /roles/:jobRole
Role drill-down: Shows role-specific table with correct data
Role drill-down: Date filters work
Role drill-down: Back button navigates to /roles
Upload Naukri CSV via dashboard upload button
Upload Pipeline CSV via dashboard upload button (0 new, 7 updated, 28 cols mapped)
Logout button works on dashboard - redirects to /login

seed_data_creation: Test data already exists from previous uploads: /app/test_data/naukri_test.csv (10 records), /app/test_data/pipeline_test.csv (7 records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New frontend structure fully tested. Key pages: Dashboard (/dashboard) with upload buttons and nav panels, Summary (/summary) with role-wise funnel table and filters, Roles (/roles) with clickable job role grid, RoleDrillDown (/roles/:jobRole) with role-specific analytics. All API endpoints working: /api/summary (with startDate, endDate, search filters), /api/job-roles, /api/role/{jobRole} (with date filters). Expected totals: total_applicants=7, shortlisted=6, rejected=2, scheduled=5, not_scheduled=2, attended=3, not_attended=4. Search 'Engineer' returns 3 roles (DevOps Engineer, QA Engineer, Software Engineer).

dashboard.upload_pipeline_btn: Working - triggers hidden file input, shows status

roles_page.role_cards: Each shows job_role name and count
